untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 8MA (sma_8) which is not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. Closest available are sma_5 and sma_10. Also, 'weekly pivot support' and multi-timeframe confluence cannot be expressed in daily-bar rule format without explicit weekly data inputs.
translation_notes: Attempted to use sma_8 for the 8-period moving average, but this is not in the allowed list. Signal also requires: (1) confirmation that 8MA is rising (would need prev comparison), (2) weekly pivot point alignment (requires weekly timeframe data), (3) R3 pivot resistance level (r3 is available). Recommend either: (A) add sma_8 to allowed indicators, or (B) substitute sma_5 or sma_10 as closest approximation, or (C) provide weekly pivot data inputs separately.
